cases.title: TS-04: Unauthenticated POST /check-in returns 401 Unauthenticated per NFR-10 100% rejection target
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header is present
Active session exists with valid QR token and enrolled student context for payload
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId, latitude, and longitude and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Assert response message is Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục per roles-permissions §2.5
Query attendance_records for the session and confirm no Present status created
cases.expected: NFR-10 check-in category: unauthenticated request rejected with HTTP 401 Unauthenticated; no attendance mutation; BR-06 enforced before domain pipeline

cases.title: Auth middleware rejects unauthenticated check-in before CheckInService executes against Postgres
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Auth middleware wired to identity-auth AuthSession repository
Active session with valid QR token exists in database
CheckInService instrumented or spied to detect invocation
steps: Invoke POST /check-in route handler without session credentials
Assert middleware returns 401 Unauthenticated before CheckInService.validateAndSubmit is called
Query attendance_records for the session and confirm no status change
Query check_in_attempts and confirm no Success outcome logged for this request
cases.expected: NFR-10 enforced at auth middleware layer with real DB; CheckInService and domain rules never execute for unauthenticated callers; zero side effects in attendance tables

cases.title: Protected endpoint sweep: 100% of check-in, reporting, export, and admin routes reject missing AuthSession
preconditions: API route registry or OpenAPI contract lists all protected endpoints per API design §1.1
Real PostgreSQL with seeded session, report, and user fixture data
No session cookie or Authorization header on test client
steps: For each protected route in check-in category (POST /check-in, GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight), call without auth and assert HTTP 401
For each protected route in reporting category (GET /reports/session/:id, GET /reports/summary), call without auth and assert HTTP 401
For export category (POST /reports/export), call without auth and assert HTTP 401
For admin category (GET /users, POST /users, PATCH /users/:id, POST /roster/import, POST /classes, POST /subjects), call without auth and assert HTTP 401

For session and attendance category (POST /sessions/:id/open, GET /sessions/:id/qr/current, GET /attendance/me/history, PATCH /attendance/:recordId, GET /auth/me), call without auth and assert HTTP 401
Compute rejection rate and assert equals 100% across all sampled protected operations
cases.expected: NFR-10 target met: every protected operation in check-in (including BR-15 preflight), reporting, export, admin, session, and attendance categories returns HTTP 401 Unauthenticated when AuthSession is absent

cases.title: POST /check-in without credentials returns 401 Unauthenticated error envelope
preconditions: API server is running
Valid check-in request body prepared per API design §6.3
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in without Cookie and without Authorization header
Assert HTTP status 401
Assert response JSON contains errorCode Unauthenticated, message Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục, and requestId
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with standard error envelope per API design §10.2; outcome Unauthenticated when check-in response uses outcome field

cases.title: GET /reports/summary without session returns 401 before report data access
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header
Closed sessions with attendance data exist in database
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-2026-A&subjectCode=HESD-W01&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 without auth
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Assert response body contains no student or attendance aggregate data
cases.expected: NFR-10 reporting category: HTTP 401 Unauthenticated; no report payload returned to unauthenticated caller

cases.title: POST /reports/export without session returns 401 before CSV generation
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header
Attendance data exists for export filter parameters
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Query export_audit_logs and confirm no new export audit row
cases.expected: NFR-10 export category: HTTP 401 Unauthenticated; no CSV body or export audit log created

cases.title: POST /users without session returns 401 before admin user creation
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header
Valid user create payload with institutionalId, email, password, and role Student
steps: POST /api/v1/users with valid JSON body and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Query users table and confirm no new row created for the payload
cases.expected: NFR-10 admin category: HTTP 401 Unauthenticated; no user record persisted by unauthenticated caller

cases.title: Unauthenticated POST /sessions/:id/open returns 401 before session state transition
preconditions: Draft session with valid room GPS exists in database
No session cookie or Authorization header is present
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open without auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Query sessions table and confirm status remains Draft
cases.expected: Instructor protected session operation blocked at authentication layer per NFR-10; HTTP 401; no state transition to Active

cases.title: Unauthenticated POST /roster/import returns 401 before enrollment mutation
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header
Valid CSV roster import payload prepared
steps: POST /api/v1/roster/import with valid CSV multipart body and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Query enrollments table and confirm no new rows from import attempt
cases.expected: NFR-10 admin category roster write: HTTP 401 Unauthenticated; no enrollment records created

cases.title: AuthSession transitions from valid to expired blocks all protected operations with 401
preconditions: Valid AuthSession exists with lastActivityAt at T0 in Postgres
TestClock fixture controls current time
Protected route handler wired through auth middleware
steps: Verify protected GET /auth/me succeeds at T0 + 7h 59m with valid session
Advance clock to T0 + 8h 1m without updating lastActivityAt
Call POST /check-in with expired session and valid payload
Call GET /reports/summary with same expired session
cases.expected: beforeState: session valid for protected actions; afterState: expired session rejected with HTTP 401 SessionExpired on all protected operations per NFR-10 and NFR-16

cases.title: POST /auth/logout then reuse revoked session cookie returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: Authenticated student session established via POST /auth/login
Session cookie value captured before logout
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/logout with valid session cookie
Assert HTTP status 204 No Content
POST /api/v1/check-in with previously captured session cookie and valid payload
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
cases.expected: Revoked session no longer satisfies NFR-10 valid authenticated session requirement; check-in blocked with HTTP 401 Unauthenticated

cases.title: Malformed or unknown session identifier returns 401 on protected routes
preconditions: No valid session exists for the test client
API server is running
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with Cookie wecheck_session=not-a-valid-uuid
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
GET /api/v1/reports/summary with Authorization Bearer invalid-token-value
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
cases.expected: Invalid session identifiers fail NFR-10 authentication check on both cookie and bearer mechanisms; HTTP 401; no user or report data leaked

cases.title: Deactivated user cannot authenticate and protected endpoints remain blocked
preconditions: Student account exists with active=false and otherwise valid credentials
No valid AuthSession exists for the user
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with deactivated student email and correct password
Assert HTTP status 403 and errorCode AccountDeactivated
Verify no Set-Cookie wecheck_session header is returned
POST /api/v1/check-in without session and assert HTTP 401 Unauthenticated
cases.expected: Deactivated user cannot obtain valid session per NFR-10; HTTP 403 AccountDeactivated on login; all protected operations remain blocked with 401

cases.title: Unauthenticated check-in deep link redirects to login preserving returnUrl
preconditions: User is not logged in (no wecheck_session cookie)
Mobile browser navigates to /check-in?token=<token-id> from scanned QR deep link
steps: Open /check-in?token=<token-id> in mobile viewport
Observe browser URL changes to /login with returnUrl query parameter encoding the check-in path
Verify check-in page content is not shown and no success confirmation appears
cases.expected: Browser enforces NFR-10 auth gate: redirects to /login?returnUrl=%2Fcheck-in%3Ftoken%3D<token-id>; no attendance action occurs; login form displayed

cases.title: Protected instructor session route redirects unauthenticated user to login
preconditions: User is not logged in
Instructor session list route exists at /sessions per roles-permissions §2.3a
steps: Navigate directly to /sessions without authentication
Observe redirect to /login with returnUrl encoding the sessions path
Verify session management UI content is not rendered
cases.expected: NFR-10 applies to all protected instructor SPA routes; unauthenticated navigation blocked with login redirect and returnUrl preserved

cases.title: Protected admin report and export routes redirect unauthenticated user to login
preconditions: User is not logged in
Admin report or export route exists at /admin/reports or /admin/export per roles-permissions §2.3a
steps: Navigate directly to /admin/reports without authentication
Observe redirect to /login with returnUrl encoding the admin path
Attempt navigation to /admin/export without authentication
Verify report table and export controls are not rendered
cases.expected: NFR-10 admin and export UI surfaces blocked for unauthenticated users; login redirect with returnUrl; no report or export data visible

cases.title: Flow A authentication gate: check-in succeeds only after valid session established
preconditions: Instructor has opened Active session with valid QR token per Flow A steps 1–3
Student is unauthenticated when opening check-in deep link from QR
steps: Student opens check-in deep link from QR payload and is redirected to login
Complete login with valid student credentials and returnUrl preserved
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with authenticated session and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
POST /api/v1/check-in with authenticated session and valid coordinates
Verify instructor GET /api/v1/sessions/:id/attendance shows Present count incremented
cases.expected: NFR-10 enforced as first gate in Flow A workshop path; preflight and check-in succeed only after valid authenticated session; 100% rejection before login, success after

cases.title: GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight without session returns 401 before enrollment validation
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header
Valid QR token exists for an Active session in database
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/{tokenId}/preflight without auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Assert response contains no session summary or enrollment pass data
cases.expected: NFR-10 check-in category: BR-15 preflight endpoint rejects unauthenticated callers with HTTP 401 Unauthenticated; enrollment validation chain never executes

cases.title: Protected student history route redirects unauthenticated user to login
preconditions: User is not logged in (no wecheck_session cookie)
Student attendance history route exists at /history per roles-permissions §2.3a
steps: Navigate directly to /history without authentication
Observe redirect to /login with returnUrl encoding /history
Verify personal attendance history table is not rendered
cases.expected: NFR-10 applies to student self-scoped attendance routes; unauthenticated navigation blocked with login redirect and returnUrl preserved
